message.content:
Search for any files that might be missing from the migration.

## Instructions
1. First checkout the original branch: cd /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place && git checkout feature/SPMAIS-32275_

2. Use git to find all files changed in the branch related to Order Details:
   ```
   cd /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place
   git diff master...feature/SPMAIS-32275_ --name-only | grep -E "(OrderDetail|MyOrders)"
   ```

3. For each file found, check if it exists in the migrated repo:
   /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/

4. Also search for any files in the original that reference OrderDetail or MyOrders:
   - grep for "MyOrdersDetails" in the original repo
   - grep for "OrderDetail" in the original repo

5. Report:
   - Files that were changed in original but not migrated
   - Files that reference these screens but weren't updated

This ensures nothing was missed in the migration.

input.description: Checkout the original branch in the source repo

Now let me check the store/slices in both repos:

content.content:
1→import { StateCreator } from 'zustand';
     2→
     3→import {
     4→  AirlineMilesSlice,
     5→  createAirlineMilesSlice,
     6→  createMarketplaceSlice,
     7→  createOrderDetailSlice,
     8→  createParameterPointsProgramSlice,
     9→  createPermissionSlice,
    10→  createPointsExtractSlice,
    11→  createPointsProductsSlice,
    12→  createRescueSlice,
    13→  MarketplaceSlice,
    14→  OrderDetailSlice,
    15→  ParameterPointsProgramSlice,
    16→  PermissionSlice,
    17→  PointsExtractSlice,
    18→  PointsProductsSlice,
    19→  RescueSlice,
    20→} from '../index';
    21→
    22→export type RewardsProgramRootStore = ParameterPointsProgramSlice &
    23→  PermissionSlice &
    24→  AirlineMilesSlice &
    25→  PointsExtractSlice &
    26→  PointsProductsSlice &
    27→  RescueSlice &
    28→  MarketplaceSlice &
    29→  OrderDetailSlice;
    30→
    31→type Slice<T> = StateCreator<RewardsProgramRootStore, [], [], T>;
    32→const asSlice = <T>(slice: StateCreator<RewardsProgramRootStore, [], [], T>) =>
    33→  slice as Slice<T>;
    34→
    35→export function setRewardsProgramSlices<T extends RewardsProgramRootStore>(
    36→  ...a: Parameters<Slice<T>>
    37→) {
    38→  return {
    39→    ...asSlice<ParameterPointsProgramSlice>(createParameterPointsProgramSlice)(
    40→      ...a,
    41→    ),
    42→    ...asSlice<PermissionSlice>(createPermissionSlice)(...a),
    43→    ...asSlice<AirlineMilesSlice>(createAirlineMilesSlice)(...a),
    44→    ...asSlice<PointsExtractSlice>(createPointsExtractSlice)(...a),
    45→    ...asSlice<PointsProductsSlice>(createPointsProductsSlice)(...a),
    46→    ...asSlice<RescueSlice>(createRescueSlice)(...a),
    47→    ...asSlice<MarketplaceSlice>(createMarketplaceSlice)(...a),
    48→    ...asSlice<OrderDetailSlice>(createOrderDetailSlice)(...a),
    49→  };
    50→}
    51→

But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.

content.content:
1→import { Box, Text, TagLabel, Button, BackDropBottom, SeparatorHorizontal, CardActivity, DetailTransactionValue, Alert } from '@semparar/design-system-app';
     2→import { PropsModalizeRef } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/@types/modelize';
     3→import React, { FC } from 'react';
     4→import { Linking, ActivityIndicator } from 'react-native';
     5→import theme from '../../styles/theme';
     6→import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
     7→import ApiError from '../../atomic/organisms/ApiError';
     8→import { eventSelectContent } from '~/constants/functions';
     9→import { MyOrdersDetailProps, STATUS_COLORS } from './Models';
    10→
    11→const MyOrdersDetailView: FC<MyOrdersDetailProps> = ({
    12→  handleGoBack,
    13→  transaction,
    14→  modalizeRef,
    15→  modalizeRefInfo,
    16→  handleOpenReportProblem,
    17→  handleCloseReportProblem,
    18→  handleOpenInfo,
    19→  handleCloseInfo,
    20→  isLoading,
    21→  hasError,
    22→  handleRetry,
    23→  isCashback,
    24→  cardTitle,
    25→  formattedPointsValue,
    26→  highlightText,
    27→  formattedCurrencyValue,
    28→  marketplaceContent,
    29→  showOrderNumber,
    30→  showStatus,
    31→  showValue,
    32→  height,
    33→}) => {
    34→
    35→  if (hasError) {
    36→    return (
    37→      <BasicScreen
    38→        title="Detalhes do pedido"
    39→        leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
    40→        errorButtonOnPress={handleRetry || (() => {})}
    41→      >
    42→        <ApiError
    43→          title="Algo deu errado!"
    44→          subTitle="Por favor, tente de novo."
    45→          isLoading={isLoading}
    46→          onPress={handleRetry || (() => {})}
    47→        />
    48→      </BasicScreen>
    49→    );
    50→  }
    51→
    52→  if (isLoading && !transaction) {
    53→    return (
    54→      <BasicScreen
    55→        title="Detalhes do pedido"
    56→        leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
    57→        hasScroll
    58→        errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
    59→      >
    60→        <Box flex={1} justify="center" align="center" minHeight={400}>
    61→          <ActivityIndicator size="large" color={theme.colors.BRAND_BASE_01} />
    62→        </Box>
    63→      </BasicScreen>
    64→    );
    65→  }
    66→
    67→  if (!transaction) {
    68→    return null;
    69→  }
    70→
    71→  const renderDivider = () => {
    72→    return (
    73→      <SeparatorHorizontal
    74→        borderWidth="smaller"
    75→        borderColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
    76→        height={1}
    77→        width="100%"
    78→        mt="xxxxs"
    79→      />
    80→    );
    81→  };
    82→
    83→  const renderMarketplaceContent = () => {
    84→    if (!marketplaceContent) return null;
    85→
    86→    return (
    87→      <>
    88→        <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
    89→          Número do pedido
    90→        </Text>
    91→        <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
    92→          #{marketplaceContent.orderNumber}
    93→        </Text>
    94→        {marketplaceContent.status && (
    95→          <>
    96→            {renderDivider()}
    97→            <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
    98→              Status do pedido
    99→            </Text>
   100→            <TagLabel
   101→              type={(marketplaceContent.statusColor as any) || 'neutral'}
   102→              text={marketplaceContent.status}
   103→              showSpacing
   104→            />
   105→          </>
   106→        )}
   107→        {marketplaceContent.paymentType && (
   108→          <>
   109→            {renderDivider()}
   110→            <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   111→              Forma de pagamento
   112→            </Text>
   113→            <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   114→              {marketplaceContent.paymentType}
   115→            </Text>
   116→          </>
   117→        )}
   118→        {marketplaceContent.shippingValuePoints !== undefined && marketplaceContent.shippingValuePoints !== null && (
   119→          <>
   120→            {renderDivider()}
   121→            <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   122→              Frete
   123→            </Text>
   124→            <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   125→              {marketplaceContent.shippingValuePoints}
   126→            </Text>
   127→          </>
   128→        )}
   129→        {marketplaceContent.valuePoints !== undefined && marketplaceContent.valuePoints !== null && (
   130→          <>
   131→            {renderDivider()}
   132→            <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   133→              Valor total
   134→            </Text>
   135→            <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   136→              {marketplaceContent.valuePoints}
   137→            </Text>
   138→          </>
   139→        )}
   140→        {marketplaceContent.vendorName && (
   141→          <>
   142→            {renderDivider()}
   143→            <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   144→              Parceiro: {marketplaceContent.vendorName}
   145→            </Text>
   146→          </>
   147→        )}
   148→        {marketplaceContent.items.map((item, itemIndex: number) => (
   149→          <CardActivity
   150→            key={itemIndex}
   151→            mt={"nano"}
   152→            title={item.name}
   153→            titleTextType="paragraphMD"
   154→            description={`Quantidade: ${item.quantity}\nValor: ${item.valuePoints}`}
   155→            descriptionTextType="paragraphSM"
   156→            showImage={!!item.cleanedImageUrl}
   157→            image={item.cleanedImageUrl ? { uri: item.cleanedImageUrl } : undefined}
   158→            showIcon={false}
   159→            iconRight={null as any}
   160→            hideBorder={false}
   161→          />
   162→        ))}
   163→
   164→        <Alert
   165→          title='Detalhes da entrega'

   174→      </>

   177→
   178→  return (
   179→    <>
   180→      <BasicScreen
   181→        title={'Detalhes do pedido'}
   182→        isLoading={isLoading}
   183→        leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
   184→        rightIcon={isCashback && !transaction?.marketplace ? "icon-help" : undefined}
   185→        rightIconOnPress={undefined}

   187→        hasScroll

   200→        <Box ml='smaller' mr='smaller' mt='xs' flex={1}>

   202→          <TagLabel

   210→          <Box flex={1} width="100%">

   244→                </Text>
   245→              </>

   248→            {marketplaceContent && renderMarketplaceContent()}

   250→
   251→
   252→          <Box width="100%" align="flex-end" mb="small">
   253→            <Button
   254→              type="ghostLarge"
   255→              text="Relatar Problema"
   256→              onPress={handleOpenReportProblem}
   257→            />
   258→          </Box>
   259→        </Box>
   260→
   261→      </BasicScreen>
   262→
   263→      <BackDropBottom
   264→        modalizeRef={modalizeRef as PropsModalizeRef}
   265→      >
   266→        <Box align="center" width="100%" mt="xxs">

   268→            <Text type="paragraphXXXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xs" align="center">
   269→              Central de Atendimento
   270→            </Text>
   271→          </Box>
   272→        </Box>
   273→
   274→        <Box pd="innerSmall">
   275→          <CardActivity
   276→            mt="nano"
   277→            icon="icon-contact"
   278→            title="Capitais"
   279→            description="4002 1552"
   280→            iconRight="icon-next"
   281→            showIcon

   283→            onPress={() => {
   284→              eventSelectContent({

   289→                location_3: 'contato_telefones',

   293→          />
   294→
   295→          <CardActivity
   296→            mt="nano"
   297→            icon="icon-contact"
   298→            title="Demais localidades"
   299→            description="0800 015 0252"
   300→            iconRight="icon-next"
   301→            showIcon
   302→            showTagLabel={false}
   303→            onPress={() => {

   311→
   312→              Linking.openURL('tel:08000150252');
   313→            }}
   314→          />
   315→          <Text type="paragraphXS" color="INTENSE_COLOR_04" mt='xxxxs'>
   316→            *Atendimento de segunda à sexta das 9h às 21h. Sábado e domingo das 9h às 17h.
   317→          </Text>
   318→
   319→
   320→        </Box>
   321→
   322→        <Box align="center" width="100%" mt='xxxxs'>
   323→          <Text type="linkMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_05" onPress={handleCloseReportProblem} align="center">
   324→            Fechar

   327→      </BackDropBottom>
   328→
   329→      {isCashback && (

   332→            type="paragraphMD"

   339→          </Text>
   340→
   341→          <Button text="Entendi" onPress={handleCloseInfo} />
   342→        </BackDropBottom>
   343→      )}
   344→    </>
   345→  );
   346→};
   347→
   348→export default MyOrdersDetailView;

    22→const MyOrdersDetailView: FC<MyOrdersDetailProps> = ({

   100→          mt="xxxxs"

   141→        {marketplaceContent.shippingValuePoints !== undefined &&

   203→          />

   205→
   206→        <Alert
   207→          title="Detalhes da entrega"

   210→          numberOfLines={2}
   211→          type="highlight"

   213→          hasIconBackground

   218→  };
   219→
   220→  return (

   226→        rightIcon={
   227→          isCashback && !transaction?.marketplace ? 'icon-help' : undefined
   228→        }
   229→        rightIconOnPress={handleOpenInfo}
   230→        hasRightIcon={isCashback && !transaction?.marketplace}

   241→          pointsColor={

   243→              ? 'PLUS_COLOR_02'

   246→        />
   247→
   248→        <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" mt="xs" flex={1}>

   253→            showSpacing
   254→            mb="xs"

   257→          <Box flex={1} width="100%">
   258→            {showOrderNumber && (
   259→              <>
   260→                <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs">
   261→                  Número do pedido
   262→                </Text>
   263→                <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   264→                  #{transaction.id}
   265→                </Text>
   266→              </>

   268→
   269→            {showStatus && transaction.status && (
   270→              <>
   271→                {renderDivider()}
   272→                <Text
   273→                  type="paragraphXL"
   274→                  color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
   275→                  mb="xxxxs"
   276→                  mt="xxxxs"
   277→                >
   278→                  Status do pedido
   279→                </Text>
   280→                <TagLabel
   281→                  type={STATUS_COLORS[transaction.status] || 'neutral'}

   308→          <Box width="100%" align="flex-end" mb="small">

   314→          </Box>

   318→      <BackDropBottom modalizeRef={modalizeRef as PropsModalizeRef}>

   321→            <Text
   322→              type="paragraphXXXL"
   323→              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
   324→              mb="xs"

---

## Migration Analysis Report: Order Details Feature

### Files Changed in Original Branch (feature/SPMAIS-32275_)

| Original File | Migrated | Status |
|---------------|----------|--------|
| `src/store/rewardProgram/api/orderDetail.api.ts` | Yes | `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/services/api/orderDetail.api.ts` |

### Integration Points Verified

1. **Routes**:
